Interface VisionAlgorithmBackend<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of image object handled (e.g. BufferedImage, Mat, CLImage).
All Superinterfaces:
AlgorithmProvider, Backend
All Known Implementing Classes:
CUDAVisionProvider, JavaAWTVisionBackend, MulticoreVisionProvider, NativeVisionProvider, OpenCLVisionProvider
public interface VisionAlgorithmBackend<T> extends Backend, AlgorithmProvider
Service Provider Interface (SPI) for computer vision algorithm backends.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    apply(T image, ImageOp<T> op)
    Applies a generic operation to an image.
    T
    createImage(Object data, int width, int height)
    Creates a new image from the given data.
    default String
    getAlgorithmType()
    Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
    default int
    getPriority()
    Returns the priority for auto-selection (higher = preferred).
    default boolean
    isAvailable()
    Checks if this backend is currently available (libraries loaded, etc.).

    getName, score

    Methods inherited from interface Backend

    createBackend, getAlgorithmProviders, getDescription, getId, getName, getType

    • getPriority

      default int getPriority()
      Description copied from interface: Backend
      Returns the priority for auto-selection (higher = preferred). Used when multiple backends are available.
      Specified by:
      getPriority in interface AlgorithmProvider
      Specified by:
